tool.name: Generate Collapse Statement
tool.description: Generate the final verdict: COLLAPSED (structural correspondence proven) or ANALOGY_ONLY (useful metaphor, not structural) (Phase 8).

implications.description: What this collapse enables or implies

ai.systemPromptSection:
### generate_collapse_statement
Generate the final collapse verdict. This is Phase 8 of the Collapse Engine workflow.

usageExamples.input: {"session_id": "sess-123", "verdict": "collapsed", "title": "SGD-Langevin Structural Correspondence", "core_claim": "Stochastic gradient descent in overparameterized networks is structurally equivalent to Langevin dynamics with temperature proportional to learning rate", "scope": "Continuous-time limit, overparameterized regime", "key_evidence": ["derivation-1", "derivation-2"], "caveats": ["Requires continuous-time approximation", "May not hold for adaptive optimizers"], "confidence": 0.85}

whenToUse: Ready to make final verdict on analogy
